result.stdout:
Description:
  PATLITE client

Usage:
  Patlite.Tools [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  clear  Clear
  write  Write
  read   Read

Options:

  --version       Show version information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Clear

Usage:
  Patlite.Tools clear [options]

Options:
  -h, --host <host> (REQUIRED)  Host
  -p, --port <port>             Port [default: 10000]
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Write

Usage:
  Patlite.Tools write [options]

Options:
  -h, --host <host> (REQUIRED)  Host
  -p, --port <port>             Port [default: 10000]
  -c, --color <color>           Color
  -b, --blink                   Blink
  -b, --buzzer <buzzer>         Buzzer
  -w, --wait <wait>             Wait
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
